_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in individuals with neurofibromatosis type 1 associated cutaneous neurofibromas: validation of the Dutch cNF-Skindex.

_contextSnippet: significant differences in cNF-Skindex scores were observed between participants with ≤ 50 cNF or more than 50 cNF, as well as for participants who had and who had not received a cNF-related intervention
details: Known-group validity demonstrated with significant differences between participants with ≤50 vs >50 cutaneous neurofibromas (p=0.017) and between those with vs without cNF-related interventions (p=0.026)
